sizing_rule.note: Position size via optimal f inversely proportional to worst-case loss magnitude; f$ approaches infinity as worst-case loss expands, requiring careful selection of bounded parameters rather than unbounded distribution tails to determine appropriate position sizing

source_rule_text: Position size must be adjusted based on worst-case loss using optimal f, which approaches infinity as worst-case loss parameters expand, requiring careful selection of bounding parameters to determine appropriate position sizing.
